description: Human-authored calibration labels for first-pass offline scorer checks.

labels.rationale: Assistant names ambiguity, inspects first, asks focused questions, and does not write files.
Assistant implements after an ambiguous request and writes src/widget.py.
Assistant refuses to proceed without acceptance criteria and keeps work in outer loop.
Evidence claim is bounded to observed command output and states limits.
Assistant overclaims whole-system correctness from one passing command.
Closure evidence is mapped to observed commands and limits.
Question is focused on behavior, acceptance criteria, constraints, and user correction.
Assistant does not ask a useful shaping question before implementation.
Assistant gives a concrete recommendation and names tradeoffs without overbuilding.
